title: Beyond the Reef
description: Enjoy ocean cities, skylands and more!
body:
# Beyond the Reef - Oceanic Modpack with cool ocean world gen!

This modpack, which is dedicated to **Vision Projects'** Minecraft-project sharing the name, is all about exploring the ocean ... **but not just the basic ocean**! The world generation has been adjusted by various datapacks and mods to feature for example:
- Ocean Cities
- Ships
- Sky Islands over the sea
- Beautiful landscape
- Deeper ocean ground for even more fun

Some QoL mods enhance the gameplay and simplify building under water. 
There are also well-chosen optimization mods to provide seamless performance without lags and incompatibilities!

_Shaders supported_
